LAW AND MOTION, 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, SUBMITTED ON JUL-01-2002 BY JAMES J. MCBRIDE. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT FINDS THAT THE MOVING PARTY HAS SUSTAINED THE INITIAL BURDEN AND THAT THERE IS NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED. THE ONLY ISSUE IS COUNSEL'S REQUEST FOR A CCP 437C(H) CONTINUANCE AND THE COURT WILL TAKE THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION TO SEE IF THIS MOTION IS PREMATURE. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
